description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark, gabled roof and a white exterior. The structure features a prominent front entryway with a covered porch, flanked by a garage on one side and a fenced yard surrounding the property. Windows are arranged in a mix of vertical and horizontal placements, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced apart, contributing to an asymmetrical facade. The house includes a combination of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, with the main roof extending over the upper story and a secondary roof covering the garage. The fencing is low and decorative, enclosing a paved area in front and a larger yard at the back. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof, white exterior, and a fenced yard. Features include a covered entryway, garage, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage door, covered porch, and decorative fencing.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the fenced backyard, secondary roof, and minimal window placement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the large fenced yard, back door, and a few windows on the upper and lower stories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the side windows, secondary roof, and the continuation of the perimeter fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entry with a simple door, small porch, and overhanging roof, adjacent to a garage door and bordered by a low decorative fence.
